title: HR Coordinator
description:
Key Responsibilities

  • Serve as the primary contact for deployed IT resources
  • Handle employee queries related to attendance, leave, access, onboarding, and offboarding
  • Maintain accurate records of resource deployment and allocation
  • Receive and resolve day-to-day staff concerns
  • Escalate issues to the Senior Manager when required
  • Ensure timely follow-up and closure of issues
  • Coordinate with client stakeholders, internal HR/Admin teams, and vendors
  • Ensure compliance with client processes and operational requirements
  • Follow SOPs, workflows, and escalation procedures
  • Track timesheets, approvals, access, and compliance items
  • Prepare regular operational and staffing reports
  • Obtain resource requirements from hiring/project managers
  • Coordinate with outsourcing vendors for staffing needs
  • Support process standardization and documentation
  • Assist in internal and external audits

Requirements

  • Experience in administrative operations, resource coordination, or HR support
  • Good organizational and documentation abilities
  • Ability to handle multiple stakeholders and priorities
  • Attention to detail and problem-solving skills

---------------------------

Please refer to U3’s Privacy Notice for Job Applicants/Seekers at https://u3infotech.com/privacy-notice-job-applicants/. When you apply, you voluntarily consent to the collection, use and disclosure of your personal data for recruitment/employment and related purposes.

postedCompany.description:
U3 INFOTECH PTE. LTD.

U3 INFOTECH (U3) offers a complete range of Software Services, Business Solutions and Project Management Outsourcing and Project Management Training. We have an excellent domain expertise in business verticals such as Banking and Financial Services, Insurance, Semiconductors, Healthcare Services, Supply Chain, and Technology.

U3 has diversified experience and domain expertise across industries and skill sets, on various technology platforms backed by matured delivery capability, project and program management methodology and strong commitment to serve our clients.

U3 Infotech is rapidly growing to establish itself as a professional services and business-consulting provider, working with few of the biggest named customers across various industry segments.
